04-05.event: Alzarri Joseph recorded the best bowling figures in IPL history (6/12) for Mumbai Indians against Sunrisers Hyderabad in Hyderabad.

04-07.event: Dwayne Bravo's heroic 68 off 30 balls helped Chennai Super Kings chase down 165 against Mumbai Indians after being 118/8, marking CSK's triumphant return to the IPL.

04-18.event: Brendon McCullum lit up the first-ever IPL match with a spectacular 158* for KKR against RCB, setting the tone for the massive success of the tournament.

04-23.event: Chris Gayle smashed the highest individual score in T20 cricket, hitting 175* off 66 balls for RCB against Pune Warriors India at the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium.

05-12.event: Mumbai Indians won their 4th IPL title by defeating Chennai Super Kings by just 1 run in a thrilling final that went down to the final ball.

05-24.event: Mumbai Indians defeated Chennai Super Kings by 41 runs at Eden Gardens to lift their second IPL trophy, with Rohit Sharma scoring a quickfire 50.

05-28.event: Chennai Super Kings won their 5th IPL title in a thrilling rain-affected final against Gujarat Titans, with Ravindra Jadeja hitting a four on the final ball.
